html:
Exclusive to:

For the similar Hamlet DLC items, see Nettle.

Fire Nettle Fronds are a Vegetable Food exclusive to Don't Starve Together and introduced in Return of Them.

They can be harvested from Fire Nettles. Upon consumption, they cost 3 health, 5 sanity and increase the player's perceived temperature by 60° for 1 minute, making them less susceptible to freezing.

Contents

  • 1 Dried Fire Nettle Frond
  • 2 Usage
  • 3 Trivia
  • 4 Gallery

Dried Fire Nettle Frond

Dried Fire Nettle Fronds are made from drying Fire Nettle Fronds on the Drying Rack. They can be used to make Fire Nettle Tea at Pearl's Tea Shop.

Trivia

  • The Fire Nettle Frond was introduced in the Reap What You Sow update.

Gallery

  • Dried variant concept art from Rhymes with Play stream.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

–Warly

–Winona

–Wortox
“Don't like them...”
–Wurt
“They're even worse than poison oak!”
–Walter
“I have a feeling I shouldn't touch that.”
–Wanda

Tóm tắt

Lá tầm ma lửa là một loại Thực phẩm Rau củ độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them.

'''Fire Nettle Fronds''' are a [[Vegetables|Vegetable]] [[Food]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' and introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''.

They can be harvested from [[Fire Nettles]]. Upon consumption, they cost 3 health, 5 sanity and increase the player's perceived temperature by 60° for 1 minute, making them less susceptible to [[freezing]].
